creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Trying to install IMP from mail/horde-imp produces this error:

===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>   php71-horde-imp-6.2.22 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by php71-horde-imp-6.2.22 for building

=> SHA256 Checksum OK for Horde/imp-6.2.22.tgz.
===>  Patching for php71-horde-imp-6.2.22
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for php71-horde-imp-6.2.22
===>   php71-horde-imp-6.2.22 depends on file: /usr/local/share/pear/PEAR/Installer/Role/Horde/Role.php - not found
===>   Installing existing package /usr/ports/packages/All/php71-pear-horde-Horde_Role-1.0.1.txz
Installing php71-pear-horde-Horde_Role-1.0.1...
pkg-static: Missing dependency 'pear'

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): /usr/ports/packages/All/php71-pear-horde-Horde_Role-1.0.1.txz
*** Error code 70

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/horde-imp

Note: no package available
